name: kyb.com
message:
Automotive Parts

KYB Americas Corporation was established in 1974 and is headquartered in Greenwood, IN, USA. KYB manufactures original equipment shocks and struts for carmakers in the Americas and around the globe.

Website: https://www.kyb.com/

Revenue : $600.5M

Address: 850 N Graham Rd Ste C, Greenwood, Indiana, 46143, United States

Phone Number: (317) 881-7772
